test.notes: Most tests passed. Two evidence_pipeline tests (test_evidence_pipeline_chunking, test_evidence_pipeline_process) in swell-orchestrator hang/take >60s each. These are unrelated to M1 docs milestone. Workspace tests otherwise complete successfully.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Consider adding explicit coverage of `select` and cancellation safety patterns in the Async Patterns section. Current section covers tokio::main, #[tokio::test], Send+Sync, spawn, spawn_blocking, channels, but omits select! and cancellation which were mentioned in the original task prompt.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature docs-agents-root-update (worker session 6bde19d1) noted this gap. VAL-DOC-012 only requires 'tokio, spawn, and at least one of select, cancellation, or async patterns' which is technically satisfied, but fuller coverage would be more helpful.

rejectedObservations.observation: docs-worker skill file does not exist in .factory/skills/
rejectedObservations.reason: Informational only - workers completed documentation tasks successfully without the skill file. Not a blocker.

rejectedObservations.observation: Some AGENTS.md files exist as untracked (not committed)
rejectedObservations.reason: Feature docs-per-crate-agents-middle created files for swell-validation, swell-memory, swell-state, swell-sandbox but they show as untracked in git. This is a git hygiene issue, not a functional issue - all files exist and contain correct content.

summary: M1 (docs) scrutiny validation passed. All 6 documentation features reviewed successfully: README rewrite, root AGENTS.md update, 8 per-crate AGENTS.md files (across 3 features), and CONTRIBUTING.md. All VAL-DOC-* assertions (VAL-DOC-001 through VAL-DOC-012) are addressed by the implemented documentation. Typecheck and clippy pass. Tests mostly pass with 2 unrelated evidence_pipeline tests hanging (unrelated to M1). No blocking issues.
